title: pepinia luteyniorum
intro: Pepinia luteyniorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family, which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used traditionally in folk medicine, particularly in Ecuador, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pepinia luteyniorum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Pepinia luteyniorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
